nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 太平洋
nodes.summary: 太平洋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联49种鸟类，包括针尾鸭、马岛冢雉、斑肩姬地鸠等49种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 旅鶇
nodes.summary: 旅鶇（American robin，学名 Turdus migratorius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于美國墨西哥灣沿岸地區、太平洋，主要威胁包括气候变化。
locations: 美國墨西哥灣沿岸地區

nodes.name: 美國墨西哥灣沿岸地區
nodes.summary: 美國墨西哥灣沿岸地區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括玫瑰琵鷺、褐鵜鶘、鹗等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: confinis, isolated in the Sierra de la Laguna mountains of southern Baja California Sur in Mexico.]] The species breeds throughout most of North America, from Alaska and Canada southward to northern Florida and Mexico. While robins occasionally overwinter in the northern part of the United States and southern Canada, most migrate to winter south of Canada from Florida and the Gulf Coast to central Mexico, as well as along the Pacific Coast. Most depart south by the end of August and begin to return north in February and March (exact dates vary with latitude and climate)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: propinquus) in central California is considered to be expanding its range, as is likely the case elsewhere in the United States. It is threatened by climate change and severe weather, but the population trend appears to be stable, and the species does not approach the vulnerable species thresholds under the population trend criterion (>30% decline over ten years or three generations), and therefore International Union for Conservation of Nature evaluated it as least concern. At one point, the bird was killed for its meat, but it is now protected throughout its range in the United States by the Migratory Bird Treaty Act
